title: coix lacryma-jobi f. palustris
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi f. palustris, also known as Job's Tears, is a type of annual plant belonging to the family Poaceae, native to Asia and grown for its seeds and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The seeds of Coix lacryma-jobi f. palustris have been found to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Job's Tears include teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
